title: Show version of the deb package in info output
body:
Previously just showing name of the package, followed by
the path repeated again (already stated on the line above)


BEFORE:

```
  conmon:
    package: 'conmon: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon'
    path: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon
```

```
    name: crun
    package: 'crun: /usr/bin/crun'
    path: /usr/bin/crun
```

```
  slirp4netns:
    executable: /usr/bin/slirp4netns
    package: 'slirp4netns: /usr/bin/slirp4netns'
```


AFTER

```
  conmon:
    package: conmon_100:2.0.30-2_amd64
    path: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon
```

```
    name: crun
    package: crun_100:1.2-2_amd64
    path: /usr/bin/crun
```

```
  slirp4netns:
    executable: /usr/bin/slirp4netns
    package: slirp4netns_100:1.1.8-3_amd64
```

comments.body:
Changes LGTM and one of the tests looks to have flaked.  I've restarted.
I'm always a little leery about small output changes possibly upsetting older scripts, but I think this will be OK.

This was just the "package" string, which didn't seem to have any definition anyway ?

For the --version output (in `version`), it is still chaos. Mostly crun, breaking the format (multi line)
